posting.sourceTitle: Engineers JTF Local #832 DBA Upstate Engineers 158
posting.locationSummary: Finger Lakes, Southern Tier, and Western New York
posting.applicationSummary: Apply in person at Upstate NY Engineers TF, 3174 Brighton-Henrietta Town Line Road, Rochester, NY 14623, Monday through Friday from 8:00 a.m. to 3:30 p.m. during the recruitment period. Only 25 applications will be distributed, first come first served.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Upstate NY Engineers TF, 3174 Brighton-Henrietta Town Line Road, Rochester, NY 14623
posting.applicationHours: Monday through Friday, 8:00 a.m. to 3:30 p.m., excluding Saturdays and Sundays, during the recruitment period.
posting.applicationLimitDetails: Limited-application recruitment. Only 25 applications will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis. Recruitment will run for 10 business days or until 25 applications have been issued, whichever comes first. Applications must be received no later than June 8, 2026.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or high school equivalency diploma such as GED or TASC.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must reside within the jurisdiction of Local Union #832, including Allegany, Chemung, Livingston, Monroe, Ontario, Schuyler, Steuben, Wayne, and Yates counties, plus the eastern part of Genesee County including the City of Batavia.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have a valid driver's license to operate company vehicles and reliable transportation to and from various work sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a drug/alcohol screening after selection and prior to enrollment, at the sponsor's expense. Apprentices may be subject to random drug testing at any time during apprenticeship.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as GED or TASC.

Must have a minimum of one year of trade-related experience, or have successfully completed a construction-related pre-apprenticeship, or have successfully completed a construction-related training program.
Must be able to read, hear, and understand verbal instructions and warnings given in English.

Must sign an affidavit stating that they are physically able to perform the work of an Operating Engineer (Heavy Equipment), including lifting heavy objects, working in confined spaces, operating hazardous machinery, working in extremely dusty conditions, working in extremely hot, cold, and damp weather, working over water, working from heights, and being exposed to loud noises and/or respiratory irritants.
Must pass a drug/alcohol screening after selection and prior to enrollment, at the sponsor's expense.
Apprentices may be subject to random drug testing at any time during their apprenticeship.

Must reside within the jurisdiction of Local Union #832, including Allegany, Chemung, Livingston, Monroe, Ontario, Schuyler, Steuben, Wayne, and Yates counties, plus the eastern part of Genesee County including the City of Batavia.
Must possess a valid driver's license in order to operate company vehicles.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various work sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 18+, have a high school diploma or equivalent, and either one year of trade-related experience or related pre-apprenticeship/training. They must live in the Local Union #832 jurisdiction, have a valid driver's license, reliable transportation, and be able to pass drug screening.
posting.contactSummary: For more information, contact IUOE LU 158 Training Fund District # 832 at (315) 299-6104.
